commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 27:26 And over them that did the work of the field for tillage of the ground was Ezri the son of Chelub: Ground, for the king. This was done at the expense of the nation, and by the people, no less than the vintage, 2 Kings viii. The companions of Daniel were thus appointed to superintend the workmen of Nabuchodonosor, Daniel ii. Xenophon (Cyrop. ) styles such, ergon epistatas, "men set over the works.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
